{{Shell
|name={{PAGENAME}}
|image={{PAGENAME}}.png
|description=The travelers used to hand out these helmets, but too many were caught speeding, so the travelers stopped issuing them.
|affct=CIV
|hard=RUSH
|source=Divine Neutral Chest (0.2%)
|color=purple
|earth=8
|water=7
|fire=5
|wind=6
|form=Mutant
|element=Earth
|realm=Yamato
|orangehard=ATK
}}
